plugins.name: jfr-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze Java Flight Recorder (JFR) files for GC, CPU, memory allocation, lock contention, and I/O latency. Supports .jfr binary and plain-text exports.

plugins.name: esrally-analyze
plugins.description: Analyze esrally benchmark reports and generate structured technical summaries. Supports single-run analysis, A/B comparison, and multi-run baseline statistics.
